title: scutellaria × churchilliana
intro: Scutellaria × churchilliana, also known as Churchill's skullcap or hybrid skullcap, is a hybrid plant species within the genus Scutellaria, belonging to the mint family Lamiaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Scutellaria × churchilliana include reducing anxiety and stress, improving sleep quality, and possessing neuroprotective properties that may help prevent age-related cognitive decline. Scutellaria × churchilliana is often prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or capsule, allowing for various forms of consumption for its medicinal and health benefits.
